name: Sugarless Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out half of the pastry to fit a 9-inch pie plate. Fit into the pan and trim the pastry 1 inch beyond the rim of the pie pan.
2. Heat undiluted apple-juice concentrate and cinnamon in a large saucepan over low heat until warm.
3. Add the apple slices and cook, stirring occasionally, until partially tender. Remove the apple slices with a slotted spoon.
4. Mix cornstarch and water until smooth. Stir into the juice in the saucepan, cooking over medium-low heat and stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Combine apples and sauce. Allow to cool slightly.
6. Fill the unbaked pastry shell and dot the top of the fruit with margarine.
7. Roll out remaining pastry and fit over the filling. Trim the pastry 1 inch beyond the rim of the pie pan.
8. Fold edges under, flute as desired, cut vents in the center of the pastry for steam to escape.
9. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 45 minutes until golden brown.
